selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the first uncovered parent after the already-reduced active and work-surface run in the current ledger slice.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the Stage-3 spillover sendpack into a smaller controller-usable handoff packet without rereading raw sources or touching active control surfaces.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best direct follow-on once the upstream Stage-3 handoff packet is narrowed.
Best next low-entropy sibling if the queue returns to active ingest and promotion boundaries.
Useful archive lineage follow-on, but not part of this bounded work-surface transport reduction.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the Stage-3 handoff stack, contradiction signatures, and source-class boundaries needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: MICRO_NOTE_CHANNEL_IS_COORDINATION_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the smallest reusable human-side rule while keeping authority on the formal handoff stack.

candidate_items.name: SERIAL_SINGLE_ATTACHMENT_DISPATCH_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's logical-set versus transport-unit split into a direct external dispatch rule.

candidate_items.name: OUTPUT_ONLY_RETURN_HYGIENE_WITH_CONTEXT_LOSS_CAUTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the lean return contract reusable without erasing the context dropped by outputs-only packaging.

candidate_items.name: CHECKSUM_LEDGER_FILENAME_BINDING_WITHOUT_DRIFT_ERASURE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves a direct filename-binding rule while keeping control-file naming drift visible and unresolved.

candidate_items.name: WRAPPED_CHILD_JOB_TRANSPORT_ONLY_CLASSIFICATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Prevents transport inventory from backsliding into payload-semantic or execution-status claims.

quarantined_items.name: WORK_LOCAL_SEND_ORDER_AS_ACTIVE_PROTOCOL_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Useful spillover transport mechanics cannot self-promote into active protocol law from a `work/`-local packet.

quarantined_items.name: TEN_JOB_SET_AS_EXECUTION_SUCCESS_OR_PAYLOAD_SEMANTIC_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch is transport archaeology only and does not prove execution success or direct payload processing.

notes: This batch preserves the Stage-3 sendpack as spillover transport archaeology rather than active protocol law.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
